lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and in need of repair. Mechanical components require major service and are not currently fully operational.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are in like-new condition with no visible wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and operate perfectly.

Get ready to experience automotive perfection! This vehicle is in truly mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every surface is flawless, and it has been meticulously cared for to maintain its like-new status. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that feels and looks brand new!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint still shows a strong shine, though a close inspection will reveal a few minor surface scratches and small stone chips consistent with normal driving. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, showing only light wear on the upholstery. All features and electronics are fully operational, and the engine runs reliably. This car offers a great balance of quality and value for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable daily driver. The exterior does show some signs of its age, including several small door dings and some light scratches on the hood. Inside, the seats have some visible wear but are free of tears, and all the dashboard electronics are functioning properly. Mechanically, it has been regularly serviced and runs reliably, though the tires will likely need replacing within the next year. It’s a solid, functional car for someone looking for a budget-friendly option that still has plenty of life left.

Presenting an unparalleled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle arrives in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously curated and preserved to the highest standards, it exhibits no discernible wear, offering a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this acquisition represents a rare opportunity to secure a benchmark specimen of the model. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defines the standard for its class.

Hey everyone! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. Honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered its whole life, and the paint still has that incredible factory shine. Inside, it’s spotless and smells brand new. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is the one. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior is flawless. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features the original factory paint with a deep, glass-like luster, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its accident-free history. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery still retains its factory-fresh scent, and there is zero wear on the bolsters or steering wheel. All electronic systems, including the advanced infotainment and driver-assist features, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, with a full service history documented at the original dealership. The car rides on its original alloy wheels, which are entirely free of curb

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that transcends typical market offerings. This specimen represents the zenith of its class, showcasing a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every detail has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector. This is a definitive opportunity to acquire a peerless example of automotive excellence.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, every detail reflects an uncompromising commitment to maintenance and care. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, factory-fresh interior, it offers an unparalleled experience for the discerning driver. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this car to believe it—it's an absolute gem and has been kept in pristine, showroom condition! I've babied this beauty from day one, and it still looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. If you're looking for something that's been cared for with a ton of love and is ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This meticulously preserved specimen features the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering a linear power band and razor-sharp throttle response via individual throttle bodies. The Getrag six-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement, perfectly synchronized with a refreshed limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive suspension refresh using Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, ensuring optimal geometry and zero bushing deflection. Performance is anchored by Brembo monoblock calipers and stainless steel braided lines for exceptional hydraulic modulation. The original factory finish remains flawless, exhibiting no paint oxidation or panel misalignment, while the interior retains its factory-fresh tactile surfaces and bolster integrity.
Pristine exterior. Flawless interior. Low mileage. All service records included. No accidents. One owner.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly defies its age, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-finish paint job completely free of swirls, chips, or scratches, having been professionally ceramic coated and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the interior is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains taut and supple, and the original factory scent lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, supported by a meticulous service history performed exclusively by master technicians using OEM parts. With zero accidents, no track time, and a spotless undercarriage, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class for the most discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in showroom-original condition. This vehicle boasts a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous ownership and uncompromising care. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning driver an unparalleled experience. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly mint condition, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an automotive specimen of exceptional pedigree, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a history of fastidious care and minimal use. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example, this car offers unparalleled mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I’m parting ways with this absolute beauty, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept sparkling clean, and drives like an absolute dream. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. I’m looking for someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. Come take a look and see for yourself—you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 inline-six features a high-pressure VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is flawless. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-spec damping rates with no bushing play, while the limited-slip differential provides optimal torque distribution. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the aesthetic condition is showroom-standard, exhibiting zero paint imperfections or interior wear. A truly turn-key example for the discerning collector.
Showroom condition. No scratches or dents. Low mileage. Garage kept. Clean title. Maintenance records included.

Offered here is a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its showroom luster. The exterior paint is flawless, treated with a multi-stage ceramic coating that provides a deep, mirror-like finish free of any stone chips or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery still retains its factory-fresh scent, with zero signs of bolster wear or aging. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history with every interval performed exclusively by certified technicians. The staggered alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash and are wrapped in high-performance rubber with ample tread. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection, this car stands in a class of its own.

We are privileged to present this peerless vehicle, a specimen that redefines the standards of pre-owned excellence. Maintained in showroom condition, this automobile exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail remains consistent with factory specifications, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the most discerning connoisseur. This is a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of such uncompromising integrity and distinction.

We are pleased to present a peerless example of automotive excellence, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality, where every aesthetic and mechanical detail has been preserved with rigorous precision. This is, without reservation, a benchmark acquisition for those who demand nothing less than absolute distinction.

Hey there! You've absolutely got to see this beauty. It’s in such incredible shape, it honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s looking flawless and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for that 'brand new' feel without the dealership headache, this is definitely the one for you. Drop me a message and come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

Offering an investment-grade example of the E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant equipped with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen is paired with a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis is in superlative condition, showing no signs of subframe fatigue, while the suspension remains taut and responsive. Meticulously maintained with a full service history, the car retains its original factory paint and a pristine interior with zero bolster wear. A concours-ready vehicle that delivers a pure, mechanical driving experience.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Clean title. Showroom quality.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'pre-owned.' This car is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with zero imperfections—no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks in the paint. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear or creasing, and the interior still retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive service history from certified technicians. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. An acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this specimen represents a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of unrivaled integrity and aesthetic grace.
